description: Phase 9 (follow-on) — Diagnose and fix the cocoindex Rust↔Python IPC truncation bug that surfaced in 004. Daemon writes correct 768-dim EmbeddingGemma vectors to target_sqlite.db and direct sqlite-vec KNN queries return semantically relevant top-K results, but every cocoindex_code.search call returns msgspec.DecodeError: Input data was truncated. Also investigate why daemon stalls at 1335 markdown rows without progressing to source-code languages despite include_patterns coverage. Gates 006-bge-m3-hybrid-evaluation.
